caption: A gold-colored screen displays a digital announcement from the "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION." The logo for "super science saturday" is positioned on the left, featuring a small starburst icon. Large white text reads "NEXT UP," followed by "TOUR NCAR Research Aviation Facility." The frames capture a countdown timer at the bottom of the screen, which updates in chronological order. The time changes from "12:00" to "11:58," then to "11:57," and finally to "11:55." No people, clothing, or physical equipment are visible, as the video consists entirely of this static graphic with a changing numeric value. The background remains a consistent solid gold color across all frames, with all text and logos remaining in their fixed positions.
